content.verdict: Kagi is North Malé Atoll's adults-only wellness sanctuary — 16+ only, 50 villas, and home to the largest spa in the Maldives featuring treatment rooms with panoramic ocean views. For honeymooners who want quiet, wellness, and value at a top-tier island, Kagi punches far above its nightly rate.
content.best_room: The Sunset Water Villa with private pool — sunset-facing deck, infinity pool over the lagoon, and direct reef access. Beach lovers should choose a Sunrise Beach Pool Villa, perfect for morning swims.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Speedboat Transfer
itinerary_7_nights.description: 50-minute speedboat from Malé. Adults-only welcome, villa tour, sunset on the deck.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa Immersion Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Full day wellness — hammam, couples massage, facials — in the mega-spa with ocean views. Light healthy dinner at Jaafaiy.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Reef & Lagoon Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning snorkel on house reef (turtles and reef sharks), Seabob session, sunset at Baakuri bar overlooking the lagoon.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Private Sandbank Picnic
itinerary_7_nights.description: Speedboat to sandbank with Champagne picnic and snorkel gear. Evening: private beach dinner by candlelight.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Wellness Activities
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning yoga at the overwater yoga pavilion, sound healing, meditation. Afternoon free by the pool. Teppanyaki dinner at Jaafaiy.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Dolphin Cruise & Dive
itinerary_7_nights.description: Sunset dolphin dhoni cruise, optional dive at nearby reef. Dinner in the overwater restaurant with wine pairing.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Floating breakfast in your pool, final reef swim, speedboat to Malé.

caveats: Minimum age 16 — not suitable for families
Speedboat transfer 50 minutes — can be bumpy in rough sea
Spa treatments cost extra on top of room rate

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes — adults-only, wellness-forward, and exceptional value for the villa quality.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: November to April for dry, calm weather.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: 4 months ahead; deals sometimes appear for shoulder season.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: Yes, 16+ only — one of few true adults-only islands in the Maldives.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Sunset Water Villa with pool for honeymooners.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: 50-minute speedboat transfer from Velana International Airport (MLE).
